title: Jack Pack
description: Vanilla optimization and aesthetic pack for use on servers like Hypixel that I made for my friend JackP14.
body:
# Jack Pack

## Description:
An optimization and aesthetic for use on servers (like Hypixel), vanilla-compatible Modpack that I put together for my friend Jack (JackP14).

## Special Credits: 
(Thank you)
### Mods
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
### Misc
- [Better Vanilla Building]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bettervanillabuilding))
